case_title: JAMES SIMMONS VS. TRANSVIRTUAL TECHNOLOGIES INC. A CALIF CORP

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIMMONS, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT TRANSVIRTUAL TECHNOLOGIES INC. A CALIF CORP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
